inventory_policy.scope: Backdoor paths for the total effect of assisted_within_24h on activation_14d.
inventory_policy.include_rule: Include observed baseline causes or proxies that appear on active backdoor paths, and explicitly list unmeasured confounders that cannot be adjusted directly.
inventory_policy.exclude_rule: Do not include treatment, assignment mechanism after time zero, mediator, collider, outcome or post-treatment selection variables in the primary total-effect adjustment set.

confounders.rationale: Unobserved baseline motivation causes both actual treatment take-up and activation; measured proxies do not close the direct latent path in the declared DAG.
evidence_needed: alternative design such as encouragement or quasi-experiment

confounders.rationale: Platform influences friction and activation, so it participates in measured backdoor paths.
Device tier influences crashes, network quality and activation before treatment.
Acquisition channel captures baseline intent and affects both pre-treatment engagement and activation.
Region affects rollout/capacity and activation, so it is a pre-treatment confounder for observed adjustment.
Language affects support availability and activation through localization quality.
Network quality is measured before treatment and affects friction, crashes and activation.
Pre-treatment app crashes affect friction score and future activation.
Pre-treatment progress affects friction and activation and is an imperfect proxy for motivation.
Baseline sessions affect activation and partially proxy motivation, but do not measure it perfectly.
Friction score directly drives offer/received assistance and future activation.
Capacity changes the chance of receiving assistance and is related to operational quality that affects activation.

forbidden_controls.forbidden_reason: assignment mechanism measured at treatment timing; including it changes the received-treatment question and may block assignment channels.
mediator on the total-effect path from assistance to activation.
post-treatment collider between treatment and friction/support need.
post-treatment selection variable affected by treatment and outcome.
primary outcome cannot be a pre-treatment control.

known_limitations: The measured adjustment set is useful for observed confounding, but it does not identify the ATE under the declared graph because latent_motivation remains open.
Proxy variables for latent motivation require a substantive measurement assumption; the auditor does not silently upgrade proxies into a perfect measurement.
Balance diagnostics in later lessons can reveal mismatch in measured covariates, but cannot prove unmeasured exchangeability.
